Footer.tagline: Senior software development for businesses that need it done right.

hero.headline: Web, mobile, and AI-powered systems — built for clarity and long-term use
hero.subhead: BizVision is a software development partner helping businesses and public sector organisations design and build secure, maintainable digital systems.
hero.body: From modern web applications and mobile apps to AI agents and internal automation tools, we build software that actually supports how your organisation works — today and as it grows.

problem.lead: At some point, spreadsheets stop being enough.
items: Data lives in too many places.
Manual steps creep into everyday work.
Legacy systems feel risky but impossible to replace.

services.heading: End-to-end software development with AI built in from day one
services.subhead: We design and build secure, scalable digital systems — combining senior engineering, user-centered design, and AI-enhanced workflows.

items.title: Web Development
items.body: Modern web applications, dashboards, admin tools, and backend systems built with clean architecture and long-term maintainability in mind.

items.title: Mobile Development
items.body: Reliable cross-platform and native mobile applications designed for real-world use.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.body: Clear, accessible, and practical interface design focused on usability — not decoration.

items.title: AI Agents & Intelligent Workflows
items.body: AI solutions that automate real work — securely and responsibly.
bullets: Secure AI deployments (cloud or private infrastructure)

items.title: Senior-level expertise — without agency overhead
items.body: You work directly with experienced developers. No account managers. No unnecessary layers. No junior hand-offs.

items.title: Full-stack + UX + AI — integrated
items.body: Many companies separate backend, frontend, UX, and AI into different teams. We combine engineering, user experience design, AI automation, and cloud architecture. The result: fewer coordination gaps and more coherent systems.

items.title: Security and compliance built in
items.body: Especially for public sector and regulated environments, we design systems with security and compliance from the start.

items.title: Local presence in Helsinki
items.body: We understand Finnish business culture, public sector requirements, EU data regulations, and security expectations in government projects. We operate in both Finnish and English environments.

items.title: Public Sector Organisations
bullets: Secure internal tools and data-driven systems

roles: Senior freelance consultant within larger projects

process.heading: A clear, structured process from idea to delivery.

steps.title: Discovery & Requirements
steps.body: We clarify goals, users, constraints, and technical realities. Clear scope. Clear expectations. Clear roadmap.

steps.title: Design & Architecture
steps.body: We design both the user experience and the system architecture. Decisions are documented and transparent.

steps.title: Development & Testing
steps.body: We build with clean, maintainable code and modern best practices. Security, performance, and scalability are considered from the start.

steps.title: Delivery & Support
steps.body: Deployment, documentation, and structured handover. Ongoing support available if needed.

experience.projectTypesBody: E-commerce platforms, SaaS applications, public sector systems, operational dashboards, and mobile apps.
experience.approachBody: Agile methodology, clean code practices, user-centered design implementation.

closingCta.heading: Have a Project in Mind?
closingCta.body: Whether you're building a new system, modernising an old one, or exploring how AI could streamline your operations — let's discuss your situation.
closingCta.sub: You don't need a massive transformation plan. You need a clear next step.

hero.headline: AI systems and agentic workflows that do real work.
hero.body: Practical automation built into your systems — designed for security, measured by outcomes, not hype.

agentsExplainer.heading: What are AI agents?
agentsExplainer.bodyP1: An AI agent is software that can take a goal, break it into steps, use tools and APIs to act, and check its own work — instead of waiting for a human at every step.
agentsExplainer.bodyP2: Used well, that means routine, multi-step tasks get done reliably in the background. Used carelessly, it's a liability. The difference is architecture and guardrails.
agentsExplainer.diagramLabel: AI agent loop: Input feeds into Reason; Reason plans and decides, then calls Act via tools and APIs; Act result feeds into Check; Check loops back to Reason until done.

hero.headline: Buy the judgment, not just the hands.
hero.body: Architecture review, technical strategy, and senior leadership — for teams that need direction before, or alongside, the build.
hero.sub: Architecture · Cloud & AI strategy · Technical leadership.

items.title: Architecture review & technical due diligence
items.body: Assess an existing system, a proposed design, or a codebase before you commit budget.

items.title: Cloud & infrastructure strategy
items.body: Pragmatic decisions on hosting, scaling, and cost — without vendor lock-in by default.

items.title: AI adoption strategy & roadmap
items.body: Where AI realistically fits, what to pilot first, and what to leave alone.

items.title: Fractional / interim technical leadership
items.body: Senior direction for a team or project that lacks it, for a defined period.

items.title: Procurement & tender support
items.body: Technical input and documentation for public-sector tenders.

comparison.leftBody: You need direction, a second senior opinion, or a roadmap — and want to de-risk a decision before spending on a build.
comparison.rightBody: The direction is clear and you need it engineered. See Digital Development and AI Services.
comparison.note: Many engagements start as advisory and continue into build. You're never locked into one or the other.

closingCta.heading: Need a senior second opinion?
closingCta.body: Whether you're scoping a system, planning AI adoption, or steering a project that needs direction — let's talk.

hero.headline: Senior engineering, one accountable partner.
hero.body: BizVision is a one-person consultancy: the person you talk to is the person who designs, builds, and ships your system.

background.p1: A senior freelance software engineer based in Helsinki, with 7+ years across frontend, mobile, and full-stack development — and a current focus on AI-accelerated engineering and agentic workflows.
background.p2: BizVision exists to give SMEs and public-sector teams senior-level execution without agency overhead: no account managers, no handoffs, no junior developers learning on your project.
background.p3: When a project needs specialist skills — design, SEO, or a specific technology — I bring in trusted people from an established network, while staying your single point of accountability. One partner who stays responsible; the right people when the work calls for them.
background.credibilityText: Senior engineer, Helsinki-based. 7+ years across web, mobile, and AI. Direct partner from first call to final delivery.

items.title: Architecture first
items.body: Structure and decisions before code.

items.title: Clean and maintainable
items.body: Type-safe, modular, documented. Built to last, not just to ship.

items.title: AI-accelerated, human-judged
items.body: AI speeds the work; senior judgment stays in the loop.

items.title: Direct and transparent
items.body: Clear milestones, honest timelines, one point of contact.

workingModel.audience: Remote-first, Helsinki-based, available on-site in the capital region when it helps. Project-based or retainer. Comfortable leading solo or embedding with an existing team — and able to scale up with vetted specialists when a project's scope calls for it, without adding agency layers.

contact.prepBody: A short description of where you are now, what you're trying to achieve, and any timeline or constraints. Rough is fine — clarity comes from the first conversation.
